690.reason: [Accessing tokenStream.get(p + 1) without checking if p + 1 is within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, this condition should check if current token is INTTK and next is MAINTK to properly identify MainFuncDef.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokenStream.get(p + 1) without checking if p + 1 is within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, this condition should check if current token is INTTK and next is MAINTK to properly identify MainFuncDef.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is unsafe: when p is at the last token, p+1 will be out of bounds and cause NullPointerException or incorrect behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Unsafe lookahead: when p is the last index, p+1 will be out of bounds, causing potential NullPointerException or incorrect behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokenStream.get(p+1) without checking bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException; also, this condition is incorrect because 'int main' requires checking current token as INTTK and next as MAINTK]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing p+1 without checking bounds; may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when p is the last token]

694.reason: [Accessing tokenStream.get(p + 2) without checking if p + 2 is within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. The condition for detecting FuncDef is also incorrect - it should verify that the current token is a valid FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK), followed by IDENFR, then LPARENT.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokenStream.get(p + 2) without checking if p + 2 is within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. The condition for detecting FuncDef is also incorrect - it should verify that the current token is a valid FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK), followed by IDENFR, then LPARENT.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is also unsafe: accessing p+2 without checking bounds can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException or misidentification of FuncDef]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Unsafe lookahead: when p is near the end of token stream (e.g., p == size-1 or p == size-2), p+2 will be out of bounds, leading to errors]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokenStream.get(p+2) without checking bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException; also, function definition detection logic is flawed as it doesn't verify the presence of a valid FuncType followed by Ident]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing p+2 without checking bounds; may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or misclassify declarations as function definitions]
